title: Senior Manager/Director - Acquisitions (Real Estate)
description:
We are recruiting for APAC Logistics Fund in modern industrial and logistics real estate in key cities in Asia Pacific.

Reporting to the Head of Acquisitions, you will have the opportunity to work in a lean environment where you will be involved in the full cycle of investment and asset management such as site acquisition, underwriting and due diligence, asset management and divestment.

Your main responsibilities will include deal origination, business case proposal, deal execution and supporting the asset and fund management team.

You will be sourcing and evaluating of new business cases which includes but not limited to Green/brown field acquisition or development, Divestment, Asset Enhancement, Joint Venture opportunities, research and understand and penetrate new markets or product type. You will prepare and underwrite business case upon understanding of market and real estate parameters of the deal, building financial models and providing relevant supporting information to justify the case. Deal structuring will include other aspects like JV formation, banks, tax, finance and treasury. This will also include negotiation and overseeing due diligence. You will also recommend parameters in investments to manage risks and generate acceptable rate of return. You will work on crafting teasers, investment papers for approval to stakeholders.

Requirements:

You possess a Degree in Real Estate, Engineering, Finance or Business or related field from a recognised tertiary provider and have at least 8 years of solid experience in related investment scope such as capital budgeting and related analysis i.e., IRR, NPV, DCF, Yields. Deal experience/track record are essential for this role as they are looking to scale up with exciting growth ambitions.

You possess solid understanding of financial investment evaluation and capital decision making in the Industrial or logistics real estate industry. You are commercially sound with knowledge of Asia real estate market including properties, rents, cost structures etc. You are highly numerical with advanced financial modelling skillsets.

Excellent interpersonal and communication skills will also be held in high regards.

All applications will be treated in the strictest confidence. Personal data provided will be used for recruitment purposes only.

Please apply with your CV in word document format. We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. For other positions related to real estate or other alternative investments, please go to https://careers.tri-cap.com.sg/.

​EA Personnel: R1109270
